---
title: "Paternity Table Sources"
subtitle: "Bibliography of studies included in Rosenbaum, Grebe, & Silk (2026)"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
bibliography: paternity-table-sources.bib
csl: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/apa.csl
nocite: '@*'
---

# References
